title: Native Contracts within Monday
excerpt:
Just as monday built a Quotes and Invoices feature, there should also be a native contracts feature within monday, where Contracts can be created within monday. 
Monday’s Workforms with Signature capability is not a prop…

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just as monday built a Quotes and Invoices feature, there should also be a native contracts feature within monday, where Contracts can be created within monday.

Monday’s Workforms with Signature capability is not a proper solution for this.

Reason: Integrated apps constantly fail. It doesn’t send the contract or recipient doesn’t receive it, E&A compatibility issues at times, fails to upload PDF so cannot edit the template, and so much more. Having a native option in Monday can help mitigate many of these issues.

Necessary and desired capabilities

  • Full creative and editing privileges within monday (so can create the contract on the spot without needing to upload from Word or PDF source).
  • Column value insertion, including File column.
  • Update monday columns from information in Contract (make it optional).
  • Signature order
  • Can place email addresses within the feature, or grab from email columns. Both are desired.
  • Uploading fully signed contract to Files column.
  • Tracking of contract.
  • Allow formula and mirror data within
  • Subitems
